page_title: Explore by Asset Type — Digital Assets Dashboard
page_subtitle_html: Network or platform previews (first 8 rows each) for the main asset categories.
intro_html: On-chain RWA by asset—short previews for US Treasuries and Tokenized Stocks (RWA.xyz). Stablecoins and tokenized money market funds are on the home dashboard. Use Open full overview for search, charts, and full league views.

sections.title: Stablecoins
sections.kpi_window_note: All % changes in this row are 30-day (30D) (RWA.xyz). Headline totals from the RWA.xyz Stablecoins Overview.

sections.title: US Treasuries
sections.kpi_window_note: All % changes in this row are 30-day (30D) (RWA.xyz). Headline totals from the RWA.xyz US Treasuries Overview.
sections.preview_note: Preview: first 8 of 25 networks (US Treasuries · Distributed · Networks).

sections.title: Tokenized Stocks
sections.kpi_window_note: All % changes in this row are 30-day (30D) (RWA.xyz). Headline totals from the RWA.xyz Tokenized Stocks Overview.
sections.preview_note: Preview: first 8 of 20 networks (Tokenized Stocks · Distributed · Networks), sorted by #.

sections.title: Tokenized Money Market Funds
sections.kpi_window_note: Distributed value uses a 30-day (30D) % change vs summed token values 30 days ago. Top network share is the largest network by distributed value; the 30D figure is the change in market-share percentage points (pp), not a percent of total. Fund universe: fixed curated TMMF population on RWA.xyz US Treasuries and Non-U.S. Government Debt; KPIs, charts, and league tables use the same fund set.
sections.preview_note: Preview: first 8 of 17 networks (Tokenized MMFs), sorted by distributed value.
